documents.title: Ponytail Cleanup: Singular Dashboard, Native CLI Parsing, and Dead Surface Removal
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made ConsoleNext the sole runnable dashboard, consolidated 44 command parsers, removed dormant compatibility and dead surfaces, unified local filesystem storage, deleted superseded timing and dashboard-mtime tooling, and pruned unused error/SQLC adapters while retaining Astryx by explicit request.

documents.title: Google Social Login: Enable/Disable Contract, Hardening, and Tests
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for Google sign-in in standard auth: auth.google_oauth.enabled controls runtime routes, inspect metadata, and generated TypeScript client methods; JWKS caching, callback error redirects, expired oauth-state cleanup, fake-Google live-Postgres tests, docs, environment registry, and scenery check diagnostics are implemented.

documents.title: Google Connections and Gmail Platform: Reliable Offline Tokens for App Integrations
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for per-user Google connections in standard auth: encrypted offline refresh-token storage, single-flight cross-process refresh, reauth_required and google_scope_missing error taxonomy, connect/status/disconnect endpoints, auth.GoogleAccessToken Go API, and the Gmail integration contract for ONLV (sync, drafts, durable send outbox).

documents.title: Public Deploy Edge: Internet-Facing 80/443 Routing to Scenery Apps
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan adding a scenery deploy CLI surface: the existing privileged edge helper LaunchDaemon binds 0.0.0.0:80/443, one managed Caddy terminates public ACME TLS alongside local internal certs, and the agent routes public domains (deploy.domain in app config, one per app) to the enabled app root's live dev session with path dispatch; login-time resume LaunchAgent, reachability/DNS/power diagnostics, and helper version-drift handling across scenery upgrade.

documents.title: Snapshot Save/Load: Portable Full-App Backups of the Postgres Database and Storage Cell
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan adding a top-level scenery snapshot save|load command: one portable zip with a scenery.snapshot.manifest.v1 manifest, a pg_dump -Fc dump of the whole app database, and verbatim storage-cell store trees; explicit --db/--storage selection, --mode overwrite|merge with atomic merge-or-fail semantics, docker-exec pg_dump/pg_restore inside the managed scenery-postgres container (host fallback for external DSNs), and removal of scenery db snapshot.

documents.title: Symphony Hardening
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan hardening the Symphony dashboard and auto runner: dashboard RPC auto-mode gating, local CLI auto opt-in, run leases, stale recovery, timeout and stall statuses, max_attempts semantics, latest-run correctness, and workspace lifecycle cleanup.

documents.title: Postgres-Only Data Platform: One Database Per App/Worktree, One Schema Per Service
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan removing SQLite entirely: Postgres 18 becomes the only engine with one database per app/worktree on the shared managed server, one schema per service, scenery-native tables (auth, durable execution, seed ledger) in a scenery schema, a single shared durable job store with SKIP LOCKED leasing, a Postgres-only db CLI (branch and path removed), and end-to-end migration of the onlv client app.

documents.title: Dev Loop Performance
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan speeding up scenery up startup to full readiness through a single source snapshot, parse and compile fast paths, parallel startup phases, and tighter readiness probes; the former test-suite target is complete in plan 0050.

documents.title: scenery Documentation Index
documents.summary: Human entry point for the repo knowledge base, with explicit agent entry points and current-contract guidance.

documents.title: scenery Docs Knowledge Index
documents.summary: Machine-readable docs metadata for agents and harness validation, including active ExecPlan entries until deterministic plan indexing exists.

documents.title: scenery Repo Agent Instructions
documents.summary: Repo-local operating manual for agents changing scenery itself, including app-root config filenames, the runtime/capability model, lightweight PostgreSQL naming, parser/model, edge lifecycle, and generated-data boundaries, cached/fresh/release timing policy with locally measured package parallelism, validation, docs review-due signals, drift handling, AGENTS hierarchy, and client-app instruction rules.

documents.title: scenery Installable Agent Skill
documents.summary: Concise installed-skill entrypoint for using current scenery apps through app-root config, watch.ignore dev-loop exclusions, dev runtimes, and capabilities, including target-app AGENTS hierarchy checks, CLI JSON, standard auth Google sign-in and Google connection endpoints, beta public deploy status/setup commands, local filesystem storage inspection with offsite S3 replication, Postgres-only database services and schemas, durable task declarations backed by the scenery schema, queued job starts, interval schedules, retrying local Go handler execution, durable step/signal helpers, durable worker lease/heartbeat/complete/fail HTTP endpoints, remote durable worker execution, durable worker token creation, durable job admin CLI, and durable inspect metadata, scoped observability queries, managed toolchain diagnostics and upgrade flow, browser UI harness validation, cached/fresh/release timing interpretation with locally measured package parallelism, app validation profiles, docs review-due signals, debugging, generated clients, and validation loops.

documents.title: scenery DSL Reference
documents.summary: Human-readable reference for the current Scenery DSL surface: app config, //scenery directives, request/response/model tags, static model/page IR, generated data/web output, durable task declarations with startup DB reconciliation, queued job starts, interval schedules, retrying local Go handler execution, durable step/signal helpers, durable worker lease/heartbeat/complete/fail HTTP endpoints, durable inspect metadata, cron jobs, and inspect commands.

documents.title: scenery Agent Guide
documents.summary: Agent workflow guide for using CLI JSON, app-root config, watch.ignore dev-loop exclusions, runtime capabilities, standard auth Google connections for Gmail-style integrations, beta public deploy readiness commands, local filesystem storage inspect/CLI surfaces with offsite S3 replication, scoped observability queries, managed toolchain and upgrade commands, fresh test execution from content-addressed linked binaries, cached/fresh/release timing lanes, app validation profiles, Postgres-only app database services and schemas, internal dashboard cache artifacts including the Symphony Postgres store, WORKFLOW.md auto-run policy, and run-detail evidence, Victoria-backed trace/log history, TypeScript clients, and app-local AGENTS hierarchy.

documents.title: scenery Agent-First Harness Plan
documents.summary: Root plan translating OpenAI harness engineering ideas into scenery implementation priorities, with the browser UI harness marked as implemented baseline and route-depth work tracked separately.

documents.title: scenery Execution Plans Standard
documents.summary: Required structure for long-running agent-executable implementation plans; reviewed against current self-harness ExecPlan section enforcement.

documents.title: scenery Architecture
documents.summary: High-level repo map, architectural boundaries, invariants, and cross-cutting concerns, including lightweight PostgreSQL naming, parser-owned go/packages analysis, managed edge and generated-data lifecycles, canonical public local-filesystem storage, and content-addressed repository test execution.

documents.title: scenery Local Contract
documents.summary: Frozen local developer and agent-facing contract for scenery CLI, JSON schemas, app-root config discovery including .config.json aliasing, watch.ignore, deploy.domain/root, runtime capabilities, standard auth Google connection endpoints and encrypted token storage, beta public deploy registry/status schemas, Postgres-only app database services and schemas, durable task declarations backed by the scenery schema, queued job starts, interval schedules, retrying local Go handler execution, durable step/signal helpers, durable worker lease/heartbeat/complete/fail HTTP endpoints, remote durable worker execution, durable worker token creation, durable job admin CLI, and durable inspect metadata, local filesystem storage config/CLI schemas with offsite S3 replication, scoped observability queries, Victoria-backed trace/log history, Symphony dashboard board persistence, WORKFLOW.md auto-run policy, and run-detail diffs, harness evidence artifacts including fresh execution from content-addressed test binaries and cached/fresh/release timing lanes, validation profile artifacts, UI harness journey artifacts, internal cache artifacts including devdash app-model blobs, toolchain store and upgrade flow, generators, configured tasks, code tasks, and local runtime surfaces.

documents.title: scenery Environment Reference
documents.summary: Human reference for scenery-owned environment variables, app-injected process identity, Postgres app database URLs and schema registry env, standard auth Google OAuth and token-cipher envs, remote durable worker variables, managed toolchain controls, local dev overrides, and tooling escape hatches.

documents.title: scenery Environment Registry
documents.summary: Machine-readable registry of approved environment variables, families, metadata, documentation links, and secret flags enforced by self-harness, including Postgres app database env, service database URL patterns, standard auth Google OAuth and AuthTokenCipherKey secrets, and remote durable worker endpoint/token/service variables.

documents.title: scenery Harness Engineering
documents.summary: Agent validation loop with fresh execution from content-addressed linked test binaries, five-second cached/fresh timing lanes, release timing and isolated hotspot confirmation, shared harness evidence model, agent-context handoff file, browser UI harness route journeys and DOM artifacts, parallel managed Postgres self-harness proof, local storage restart durability proof, and doc-gardening rules for review-due and drift handling.

documents.title: scenery App Development Cookbook
documents.summary: Practical recipes for building scenery apps, app config including top-level frontends and watch.ignore, endpoints, storage objects, auth, Google Gmail connections via standard auth, middleware, Postgres database services and schemas, durable workers on the scenery schema, cron, configured generators, code tasks, generated clients, scoped observability debugging, and validation workflows.

documents.title: scenery UI Agent Contract
documents.summary: Rules for maintaining the reusable @scenery component registry, its primitives and layouts, and its guarded shadcn promotion flow; the runnable dashboard is owned separately by apps/consolenext.

documents.title: Neon Selfhost Project-Tenant Mapping
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that migrated self-hosted Neon backend state from one global tenant and branch map to project-local tenants and branch maps so dev.services.postgres.project is the Neon tenant boundary.

documents.title: Bind-Mounted Neon Storage
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that moved self-hosted Neon durable storage from Docker anonymous volumes into Scenery-owned bind-mounted directories under the shared Neon substrate root, while preserving worktree isolation through branch pins, leases, timelines, and compute endpoints.

documents.title: Built-In Neon Selfhost Driver
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made the real neon-selfhost branch driver a built-in Scenery CLI capability that auto-records, auto-resolves, owns tenant/timeline/compute lifecycle, implements branch mutations and schema diff, and proves branch/sync isolation.

documents.title: CLI Help and Human Session Status
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made root help orienting, moved full grammar into command-specific help and help all, added a machine-readable help manifest, and made bare scenery ps human-readable while preserving ps --json.

documents.title: App Validation Profiles
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that added app-owned validation profiles under `.scenery.json`, `scenery validate`, `inspect validation`, harness-style evidence artifacts, changed-file selection, and an optional harness bridge.

documents.title: CLI Observability Query Surface
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for scoped CLI-only LogsQL and PromQL/MetricsQL query commands under existing observability nouns, with discovery, JSON contracts, and session-isolation validation.

documents.title: Harness Self Summary Output
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made scenery harness self stdout summary-first, preserved explicit full archive mode, added focused harness drill-downs, and switched binary freshness to a worktree-local build.

documents.title: Agent-First Development Control Plane
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for aligning repo knowledge, active plan indexing, review-due signals, tech debt, and docs/behavior drift handling before implementation work.

documents.title: Victoria Shared Substrate Visibility
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for keeping Victoria efficient through the existing shared-agent substrate, clarifying lifecycle docs, surfacing reuse/ownership, and avoiding OS-level service management unless measured startup cost later justifies it.

documents.title: ZeroFS Production Readiness
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that hardened the app-facing storage API/runtime-route contract (tenant enforcement, durable metadata, atomic writes, crash/restart proof, fail-closed headless config, cleanup and migration proof). Superseded by plan 0094, which removed ZeroFS entirely and promoted the local filesystem backend to a production-supported kind; current contract lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: PostgreSQL 18 Default Neon Selfhost
documents.summary: Superseded ExecPlan that investigated making self-hosted Neon-backed Scenery apps run through the existing app-facing surface while moving internal storage and compute plumbing to PostgreSQL 18; replaced by the Postgres-only managed branching plan.

documents.title: Postgres-Only Managed Branching
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that removed Neon as a Scenery substrate while preserving worktree/session database branching, managed DatabaseURL injection, DB lifecycle, sync, auth, and harness behavior on PostgreSQL 18.

documents.title: Rebrand to Scenery
documents.owner: scenery maintainers / release tooling / agent DX
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for renaming the project to Scenery across repo identity, the scenery.sh module path, CLI, app model tokens, docs, CI, GoReleaser, local state paths, vanity import readiness, and the first artifact-bearing v0.2.1 release.

documents.title: Static Model/View IR
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for static //scenery:model and //scenery:page IR, generated schema/seed/backend/web layers, and production-readiness follow-ups proven through the model-dsl fixture and ONLV pilot.

documents.title: Page Record Projection IR
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that split generated collection page records from storage/sync rows with internal projection IR, inspect views projection output, generated projections.ts, and computed-column diagnostics.

documents.title: sync Page Projection Materializers
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan proving generated sync-backed frontend code realizes page-record projection IR with raw source rows, generated page records, and client-side materializers.

documents.title: Generated Page Mount Surface
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan proving generated collection pages are mountable from host apps through a stable generated package barrel and alias while preserving page-record projection boundaries.

documents.title: Simple Entity Page Pilot
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan proving the generated page mount surface with the self-contained model DSL simple entity page pilot before the Tasks stress test.

documents.title: Tasks Read-Only Stress Test
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan proving a realistic read-only Tasks page with static filter/sort IR, minimal column display metadata, generated source-row materialization, and host fixture typecheck/build/render proof.

documents.title: Existing Table Model Bindings
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan adding model.ExistingTable source ownership so generated read-only endpoints and frontend pages can target existing physical tables without emitting generated schema or seed ownership artifacts.

documents.title: Remove Former Realtime Service and Reserve Entity Stream
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that deleted the former managed realtime service from runtime startup, config, generated web contracts, docs, UI, fixtures, and environment policy while preserving /sync as a reserved future entity stream path.

documents.title: SQLite Service Databases and Postgres Removal
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan that replaced built-in managed Postgres with per-service database files across config, runtime env injection, DB CLI, branch lifecycle, standard auth, docs, schemas, and dependency cleanup; its database model is superseded by 0097.

documents.title: SQLite Durable Execution Runtime Per Service
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan that added per-service durable databases, local and remote durable workers, authenticated long-poll leasing, retries, schedules, steps, signals, job admin, inspection, schemas, docs, and migration guidance without NATS; its storage model is superseded by 0097.

documents.title: First-Class Postgres Service Databases on a Shared Dev Server
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan that added Postgres as an opt-in first-class dev.services kind with one database per app/worktree/service on a shared Docker server; its mixed-engine and per-service database model is superseded by 0097.

documents.title: Local Filesystem Storage Promotion and Complete ZeroFS Removal
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan that promotes the local filesystem storage backend to a production-supported kind for app config and headless runtime config with a documented rclone/restic S3 replication recipe, and removes ZeroFS entirely: 9P adapter, managed dev service, toolchain artifact, p9 dependency, doctor/inspect/harness surfaces, env vars, schemas, and docs.

documents.title: Local Path Routing and Per-Runtime Dev Ports
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for making localhost path routing with one automatic port per dev runtime the default local routing mode, keeping Caddy as the managed listener, making dnsmasq/domain routing optional, and exposing route manifests for agents.

documents.title: Symphony Dashboard
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that replaced the consolenext Observability page with an app-scoped SQLite-backed Symphony Kanban board, workflow store, and workflow-gated server-side Codex app-server auto runner while keeping manual process-starting runner RPCs blocked until an authenticated runner channel exists.

documents.title: Devdash App-Model Blob Store
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for the first devdash store-slimming slice: app_sessions no longer duplicate full app-model Metadata/APIEncoding, large app-model blobs are content-addressed, detail paths hydrate refs, and measurement-backed budget tests cover migration and pruning.

documents.title: Scenery Storage
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made storage a Scenery-owned beta capability with scenery.sh/storage, shared ZeroFS-backed storage cells, managed ZeroFS process/Web UI attach/reuse, session-local storage proxy, storage CLI/inspect lease surfaces, reserved HTTP storage routes, generated TypeScript browser helpers, docs, schemas, self-harness proof, and an ONLV migration proof.

documents.title: Devdash Control-Plane Store Slimming
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made devdash.json a compact single-writer control-plane store: compact app/session records, byte budget enforcement, app-model sidecar blobs, Victoria-only trace/report-log history, and agent-dashboard-owned global store writes are implemented.

documents.title: Scenery-Managed Neon Dev Cell and Branch Isolation
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for a Scenery-owned local Neon dev cell, branch-isolated managed Postgres provider, worktree/session branch pins, agent-safe worktree workflows, and default harness proof of branch/sync isolation.

documents.title: ONLV Agent Native Dev Migration
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for making ONLV consume the agent-native local development model by default through scenery-owned dev runtimes, routes, Postgres, sync, and docs.

documents.title: Agent Dev Safety Hardening
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for agent-dev hardening around ownership fingerprints, cleanup, explicit sessions, legacy escape hatches, and parallel validation.

documents.title: Agent Runtime Operational Hardening
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for source-review gap closure around devdash storage, DB-aware prune, non-destructive restart, legacy proxy removal, setup policy, and Scenery-owned parallel runtime validation.

documents.title: Browser Direct API Routing
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for replacing Pulse's same-origin Vite API proxy with direct browser calls to the agent-routed API origin, with explicit auth, CORS, and sync validation.

documents.title: Test Suite Speed and Stability
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that preserved the full repository test surface while bringing compile validation, cmd/scenery package and wall medians, and cached/fresh self-harness timing below five seconds through content-addressed linked test binaries and fresh test execution.

documents.title: Harness Self Agent Oracle
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for making self-harness a machine-readable development oracle with full tests, recommendations, timing budgets, schema validation, context pack, and drift checks.

documents.title: Remove Objectstore Functionality
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for removing the beta data/objectstore feature surface without compatibility aliases or dormant code paths.

documents.title: Structured Dev Events and Console
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for a structured source-aware dev event spine, log filters, observing-only terminal console, and error summaries over the same stream.

documents.title: Dev Event Backend Cutover and Parity
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for VictoriaLogs dev-event cutover and JSON-backed dashboard/session metadata parity; current trace summaries, trace events, and report log events are Victoria-backed per ExecPlan 0076.

documents.title: Frozen Toolchain Manifest and Managed Tool Store
documents.owner: scenery runtime / release tooling / agent DX
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for a frozen toolchain manifest, managed local tool store, toolchain CLI, and removal of implicit system PATH resolution for Scenery-managed tools.

documents.title: scenery Doctor Command
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for a fast, read-only doctor command that reports host readiness, resources, version metadata, dependency checks, and app-sensitive diagnostics.

documents.title: Remove Legacy Agent Transport
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for removing obsolete agent transport from config, routing, dashboard, tests, docs, and self-harness checks.

documents.title: Database Lifecycle Split
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for splitting DB apply, seed, and setup from generated SQLC artifacts and migrating ONLV to the new lifecycle.

documents.title: Split Local Development From Headless Runtime
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for splitting development supervisor behavior from headless runtime execution; the old headless CLI path was later removed and scenery up is the current local runtime path.

documents.title: scenery v0 Release Readiness
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for hardening a narrow production-ready v0 contract; current command contract lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: Victoria Observability Sidecars
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for supervising local VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs, and VictoriaTraces sidecars as the local observability substrate.

documents.title: Active Plans
documents.summary: Current plans that should inform agent decisions, using permanent historical IDs and linking active ExecPlans also indexed in docs/knowledge.json.

documents.title: Completed Plans
documents.summary: Completed milestones and shipped behavior, including devdash control-plane store slimming, the devdash app-model blob store, audited active-plan retirements, the Neon dev-cell/selfhost driver work, CLI observability query surface, and implemented browser UI harness baseline.

documents.title: Standard Auth Production Migration Runbook
documents.summary: Operator checklist and Postgres SQL template for preserving existing app-owned auth data when moving to scenery standard auth tables in the scenery schema.

documents.title: Tech Debt
